title: BSP SDMMC0 DT property parse audit
observations: BSP extra DT parsing covers many policy properties, including CMD23, CQE, HSQ, wait-busy, filters, performance, tuning, power delay, and request page count.
Vendor A733 SDMMC0 active properties are clocks/reset, pinctrl, max-frequency, bus-width, req-page-count, cap-sd-highspeed, cap-wait-while-busy, ctl-spec-caps, and status.
Previously audited vendor SDMMC0 properties cover store/MBUS/MSI-lite clocks, ctl-spec-caps, card-detect/power policy, timing delays, CMD23 absence, and threshold/CSDC behavior.
No active vendor SDMMC0 property was found that changes normal IDMAC descriptor memory access.
reason: The remaining active SDMMC0 properties are either already covered or affect card/policy behavior rather than descriptor fetch.
next: Do not add vendor-only DT properties to upstream DTS; wait for source-backed fabric/security evidence.
